title: Undefined fields when using .item after a branch
symptom: Fields show as undefined when using .item in expressions after a branch/merge, even though data exists in previous nodes.
applies_when: Using a node after a branch/merge
not_this_if: No branches or merges in the workflow
root_cause: When a node is placed after a branch or merge, n8n may lose track of which item corresponds to the upstream node's output. This results in expressions using .item returning undefined, despite the data being present.
fix_steps: Add a Set node before the final step
Pull the necessary fields into the main item using the Set node
Reference the fields directly from $json in the final node
agent_instruction: Insert a Set node before the last step to consolidate fields and reference them directly from $json.
